title: Robustness 4-Var
summary: Demo notebook running a 4-variant robustness analysis of dependency distance autocorrelation across 9 typologically diverse UD treebanks (72 sentences). Computes lag-1 autocorrelation excess over RPL baselines for variants A (punct-excluded >=20tok), B (punct-included >=20tok), C (punct-excluded >=15tok), D (projective-only >=20tok). Includes DerSimonian-Laird meta-analysis, pairwise variant comparisons, concrete compensatory-pattern examples, and forest/bar visualizations. All variants show negative pooled excess (A: -0.133, B: -0.102, C: -0.133, D: -0.144). Runs in 0.3s with full original permutation count (100).
